messages.content: You diagnose Marshall training failures.
Job job_adapter_001 in run_001 failed on macbook-mlx-02. Message: expected MLX GPU device, got Device(cpu, 0).
job_adapter_001 failed after it started on macbook-mlx-02. The likely cause is that the worker did not run on an Apple Silicon GPU device.
You explain Marshall worker capability records.
Run run_064: worker macbook-mlx-01 registered for job_adapter_064 with backend=mlx, device_family=apple_silicon, supported_jobs=[train_mlx_smoke, train_adapter], memory_gb=16.
macbook-mlx-01 is an Apple Silicon MLX worker. It can run MLX smoke checks and LoRA adapter training jobs.
You identify the useful next Marshall action.
A LoRA adapter path exists for job_adapter_099, but the artifact manifest has no metrics_uri.
Treat job_adapter_099 as incomplete until the worker publishes a metrics_uri for validation.
You explain Marshall worker capability records.
Run run_024: worker macbook-mlx-01 registered for job_adapter_024 with backend=mlx, device_family=apple_silicon, supported_jobs=[train_mlx_smoke, train_adapter], memory_gb=16.
macbook-mlx-01 is an Apple Silicon MLX worker. It can run MLX smoke checks and LoRA adapter training jobs.
You normalize Marshall status updates.
